metadata.description: Production-grade standards for Claude Code â€” Flutter, API (NestJS + Prisma), Web (Next.js). Install a pack, Claude applies the standards. No CLAUDE.md edits.

plugins.name: core-hooks
plugins.description: Cross-stack safety + docs-sync â€” PreToolUse hooks that block edits to secrets (.env, keys, credentials) and dangerous shell commands, plus a docs-sync skill that catches drift between code and README / CHANGELOG / docs at end-of-task moments.
